rules.name: Not_Compliant
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) OR (3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6 AND 7)
rules.label: Not Compliant

validationRule.errorMessage: This date must be greater than Today's date and less than the Until date

fields.name: What_is_the_max_distance_you_would_be_willing_to_travel_for_work_Miles
fields.fieldText: What is the max distance you would be willing to travel for work? (Miles)

validationRule.errorMessage: Please ensure this value is between 0 and 50 miles

fields.name: How_would_you_like_to_sort
fields.fieldText: How do you want Shifts sorted?

fields.name: EndorsedText
fields.fieldText:
Pre-Approved Shifts

﻿Mileages below are calculated based on your home address, please ensure this is up to date for the most accurate results.

fields.name: Shiftex
fields.fieldText:
Available Shifts

Mileages below are calculated based on your home address, please ensure this is up to date for the most accurate results.

fields.name: NoSHift
fields.fieldText:
No Available Shifts!

Your current search preferences have not returned any results. You can alter how far you would be willing to travel, change the date range you are searching and add more job preferences in order to see more shifts.

fields.name: NoSHift_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

You are not currently registered for Blue Arrow so cant use this functionality. Please ensure you have registered with ourselves and booked your interview.

fields.name: NoSHift_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

Your address is currently not correctly set up on our system so we currently cannot find nearby shifts. Please get in touch with your branch consultant to have this issue resolved.

fields.name: ShiftText
fields.fieldText:
Start Date/Time: ﻿{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c}

End Date/Time: {!Get_Shift.sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c}


Site Address:

{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Street_Address__c}

{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__City__c}

{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__County__c}

{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Postal_Code__c}

fields.name: Notes
fields.fieldText:
Notes:

{!Get_Shift.Find_Work_Notes__c}

fields.name: PayRates
fields.fieldText:
Minimum Pay Rate: £{!Get_Shift.Minimum_Pay_Rate__c}/hr*

﻿*Please note the pay rates shown are the minimum, certain roles will have extra pay for any overtime/weekend work required

fields.name: Client_Rating_title
fields.fieldText: Client Rating:

fields.name: additionalShifts
fields.fieldText:
Additional Shifts

There are additional days available to work, you can apply for these by ticking the days you want below:

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Additonal
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name,Id,Account__c,IP_Account__c,sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c, Vended_Shift__c, sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Job_Category_Text__c,Apply__c,Site_Postcode__c,Minimum_Pay_Rate__c,sirenum__Site__c,sirenum__Team__c,IP_DayShiftStartsOn__c,Scheduled_hours_minus_break__c,Scheduled_Start_Date_Text__c,Scheduled_End_Date_Text__c,Distance__c FROM sirenum__Shift__c WHERE sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c = NEXT_N_DAYS:30 AND Job_Category_Text__c IN ({!JobCollection}) AND sirenum__Cancelled__c = FALSE AND Unfilled_Shift__c = true AND Vended_Shift__c = false AND sirenum__Site__c = '{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Site__c}' AND sirenum__Team__c = '{!Get_Shift.sirenum__Team__c}' AND Id != '{!Get_Shift.Id}' AND Id NOT IN ({!ShiftList}) AND IP_Account__c NOT IN ({!AccountExclude}) AND DISTANCE(sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Coordinates__c, GEOLOCATION({!Get_Candidate.MailingLatitude},{!Get_Candidate.MailingLongitude}), 'mi') < {!Selected_Search_Radius_Value} ORDER BY sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c ASC

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Endorsements
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name,Id,Account__c,IP_Account__c,sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c, sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Job_Category_Text__c,Apply__c,Site_Postcode__c,Minimum_Pay_Rate__c,Distance__c FROM sirenum__Shift__c WHERE (sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c >= {!FromText}) AND sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c <= {!UntilText} AND Job_Category_Text__c IN ({!JobCollection}) AND sirenum__Cancelled__c = FALSE AND Unfilled_Shift__c = true AND Id NOT IN ({!ShiftList}) AND EndorsementID__c IN ({!EndorsementText}) AND IP_Account__c NOT IN ({!AccountExclude}) AND DISTANCE(sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Coordinates__c, GEOLOCATION({!Get_Candidate.MailingLatitude},{!Get_Candidate.MailingLongitude}), 'mi') < {!Selected_Search_Radius_Value} {!SearchText}

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Shift_Invite
textTemplates.text: SELECT sirenum__Shift__c, job__c, sirenum__Status__c,Client_Text__c,Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Scheduled_End_Time__c FROM sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c WHERE sirenum__Contact__c = '{!Get_Candidate.Id}' AND Shift_Date__c >= {!DateFormula}

textTemplates.name: SOQL_Shifts
textTemplates.text: SELECT Name,Id,Account__c,IP_Account__c,sirenum__Scheduled_End_Time__c, Vended_Shift__c ,sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c,Job_Category_Text__c,Apply__c,Site_Postcode__c,Minimum_Pay_Rate__c,Distance__c FROM sirenum__Shift__c WHERE (sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c >= {!FromText}) AND sirenum__Scheduled_Start_Time__c <= {!UntilText} AND Job_Category_Text__c IN ({!JobCollection}) AND sirenum__Cancelled__c = FALSE AND Unfilled_Shift__c = true AND Vended_Shift__c = false AND Id NOT IN ({!ShiftList}) AND EndorsementID__c NOT IN ({!EndorsementText}) AND IP_Account__c NOT IN ({!AccountExclude}) AND DISTANCE(sirenum__Site__r.sirenum__Coordinates__c, GEOLOCATION({!Get_Candidate.MailingLatitude},{!Get_Candidate.MailingLongitude}), 'mi') < {!Selected_Search_Radius_Value} {!SearchText}
